changelogMarkdown:
## 0.1.0-beta.17

### Fixed

- Replaces the Beta17 generated CLI wrapper with a functional command runtime, packages the local offline runtime bundle, and hardens package smoke checks so placeholder command responses cannot pass release validation.

releaseNotes.text: Replaces the Beta17 generated CLI wrapper with a functional command runtime, packages the local offline runtime bundle, and hardens package smoke checks so placeholder command responses cannot pass release validation.
